items.name: Microsoft Foundry Agent Service
items.notes: Official Microsoft Foundry product image/logo asset reused for Foundry Agent Service. Microsoft has a dedicated Agent Service product page, but the public visual identity still appears to reuse the broader Foundry branding rather than expose a distinct standalone mark.

items.name: AWS Bedrock Agents
items.notes: Official AWS architecture icon for Amazon Bedrock (`Arch_Amazon-Bedrock_64.svg` from the AWS Architecture Icons pack), intentionally reused for Bedrock Agents because AWS currently presents Agents as a Bedrock capability rather than with a separate public icon.

items.name: Google Agent Builder + ADK
items.notes: Official Google Cloud Vertex AI icon from the Google Cloud icon library, intentionally reused for Agent Builder + ADK because Google positions the managed agent surface inside Vertex AI / Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform rather than with a separate public icon entry.

items.name: CrewAI
items.notes: Official CrewAI primary logo asset from the CrewAI brand resource center (`Logo.svg`).

items.name: AutoGen
items.notes: Official AutoGen logo asset from the owner-controlled microsoft/autogen repo (`python/docs/src/_static/images/logo/logo.svg`).

items.name: LlamaIndex
items.notes: Official LlamaIndex brand asset from the LlamaIndex brand guidelines page (`llamaindex-wordmark-black.svg`).

items.name: Semantic Kernel
items.notes: Official Semantic Kernel logo asset from the owner-controlled microsoft/semantic-kernel repo (`docs/images/sk_logo.png`).

items.name: LangGraph
items.notes: Official LangGraph logo asset from the owner-controlled langchain-ai/langgraph repo (`.github/images/logo-light.svg`).

items.name: Mastra
items.notes: Official Mastra homepage/brand asset (`/brand/mastra-logo-wordmark.png`) from the owner-controlled site; the public rebrand post confirms this is the current logo system.

items.name: OpenAI Agents SDK
items.notes: OpenAI does not expose a standalone public Agents SDK logo on the official guide page; this uses the owner-controlled OpenAI developer favicon (`/favicon.svg`) as a compact service icon for the SDK surface rather than claiming a separate canonical vendor wordmark.

items.name: Atomic Agents
items.notes: Official Atomic Agents logo asset from the owner-controlled BrainBlend-AI/atomic-agents repo (`.assets/logo.png`), committed here as an optimized downscaled copy for badge use.

items.name: BeeAI Framework
items.notes: Official BeeAI Framework docs-site logo asset (`beeai-framework-light.svg`) served from the owner-controlled Mintlify CDN.

items.name: Azure Logic Apps
items.notes: Official Microsoft Azure architecture/service icon from Azure_Public_Service_Icons_V23.

items.name: AWS Step Functions
items.notes: Official AWS architecture icon from Icon-package_01302026.

items.name: Google Cloud Workflows
items.notes: Official Google Cloud workflow icon from the Google Cloud icon library.

items.name: n8n
items.notes: Official n8n wordmark asset from the n8n brand guidelines download page (`logo-dark.svg`).

items.name: LangFlow
items.notes: Official Langflow website logo asset (`/images/logo.png`). No separate brand-guidelines or media-kit page was found at review time, so this remains a homepage-sourced project logo pending a stronger primary source.

items.name: Dify
items.notes: Official Dify docs/brand-guidelines logo asset (`d05cfc6ebe48f725d171dc71c64a5d16.svg`) from the owner-controlled docs site.

items.name: Flowise
items.notes: Official Flowise docs-site icon asset (`Flowise Logo Dark High Res`) served from the owner-controlled documentation site. GitBook currently delivers the resized file as JPEG.

items.name: Haystack
items.notes: Official Haystack website logo asset (`/images/logos/haystack.png`). No separate brand-guidelines or media-kit page was found at review time, so this remains a homepage-sourced project logo pending a stronger primary source.

items.name: Rivet
items.notes: Official Rivet app logo from the owner-controlled Rivet homepage nav asset (`img/logo.svg`). Kept as a square service icon because the published asset is a square mark rather than a wide wordmark.

items.name: Azure AI Content Safety
items.notes: Official Microsoft Azure architecture/service icon from Azure_Public_Service_Icons_V23.

items.name: AWS Bedrock Guardrails
items.notes: Official AWS architecture icon for Amazon Bedrock (`Arch_Amazon-Bedrock_64.svg` from the AWS Architecture Icons pack), intentionally reused for Bedrock Guardrails because AWS currently presents Guardrails as a Bedrock capability rather than with a separate public icon.

items.name: Google Model Armor
items.notes: Google Cloud does not expose a standalone public Model Armor logo on the official product page; this uses the owner-controlled Google Cloud header logo (`https://www.gstatic.com/cgc/google-cloud-logo.svg`) as the shared vendor mark for the service.

items.name: NeMo Guardrails
items.notes: NVIDIA does not expose a standalone public NeMo Guardrails logo on the official docs surface; this uses the owner-controlled NVIDIA logo asset referenced by the docs theme (`_static/nvidia-logo-horiz-rgb-blk-for-screen.svg`) as the shared vendor mark.

items.name: Guardrails AI
items.notes: Official Guardrails AI project logo from the owner-controlled GitHub repo (`docs/assets/Guardrails-ai-logo-for-white-bg.svg`), committed byte-for-byte.

items.name: LLM Guard
items.notes: Official LLM Guard docs-site logo asset from the owner-controlled Protect AI project docs (`assets/logo.png`), post-acquisition.

items.name: Rebuff
items.notes: Official Rebuff logo asset from the owner-controlled protectai/rebuff repo (`server/public/logo.png`), committed here as an optimized downscaled copy for badge use.

items.name: Lakera Guard
items.notes: Official Lakera Guard icon asset from the owner-controlled Lakera Guard product page (`677da5b755934cb6289a0bb3_guard corner logo.svg` on the Lakera Webflow CDN), committed byte-for-byte as a square service icon.

items.name: Arthur GenAI Engine
items.notes: Official Arthur homepage logo asset captured from the owner-controlled site after the January 2026 GenAI Engine rebrand (`arthur-logo-dark.avif` via the Arthur Webflow CDN).

items.name: GitHub Copilot
items.notes: Official Copilot icon asset from the GitHub brand toolkit (`GitHub_Logos.zip` -> `Copilot_Icon_Black.svg`). GitHub changed standalone Copilot logo treatments in 2025, but this icon remains in the official pack and is used here as the compact service mark.

items.name: Amazon Q Developer
items.notes: Official AWS architecture icon for Amazon Q (`Arch_Amazon-Q_64.svg` from the AWS Architecture Icons pack), intentionally reused because AWS presents these surfaces as Amazon Q variants rather than with separate public per-variant icons.

items.name: Gemini Code Assist
items.notes: Official Gemini Code Assist wordmark asset from the owner-controlled Code Assist for Business site (`https://www.gstatic.com/cgc/codeassist/logo-gemini-code-assist-2025.png`).

items.name: Cursor
items.notes: Official Cursor favicon/icon asset from the owner-controlled Cursor site (`/marketing-static/favicon.svg`). Kept as a square service icon because the published public asset is an app/favicon mark rather than a standalone wordmark.

items.name: Windsurf
items.notes: Official Windsurf favicon/icon asset from the owner-controlled Windsurf site (`/favicon.svg`). Kept as a square service icon because the public wordmark asset is white-only while the favicon is the clean published standalone mark.

items.name: Microsoft 365 Copilot
items.notes: Official Microsoft Copilot icon asset from the owner-controlled Microsoft 365 adoption site (`icon-copilot.svg`), reused for Microsoft 365 Copilot branding. Checked-in SVG adds title/accessibility metadata, so it is source-verified on 2026-05-14 but not byte-identical.

items.name: Gemini for Workspace
items.notes: Official Gemini product logo asset from the owner-controlled Google Workspace Gemini page (`logo_gemini_2025_color_2x_web_96dp.png`), verified byte-for-byte against the live source on 2026-05-14; Google uses this shared Gemini mark across Workspace Gemini packaging.

items.name: Amazon Q Business
items.notes: Official AWS architecture icon for Amazon Q (`Arch_Amazon-Q_64.svg` from the AWS Architecture Icons pack), intentionally reused because AWS presents these surfaces as Amazon Q variants rather than with separate public per-variant icons.

items.name: Copilot Studio
items.notes: Official Copilot Studio icon from the Microsoft Power Platform icons pack (`Power-Platform-icons-scalable.zip` -> `CopilotStudio_scalable.svg`). Checked-in SVG adds title/accessibility metadata for inline use, so it is source-verified on 2026-05-14 but not byte-identical.

items.name: Amazon Q Apps
items.notes: Official AWS architecture icon for Amazon Q (`Arch_Amazon-Q_64.svg` from the AWS Architecture Icons pack), intentionally reused because AWS presents these surfaces as Amazon Q variants rather than with separate public per-variant icons.

items.name: Gemini Enterprise
items.notes: Official Gemini product logo asset from the owner-controlled Google Workspace Gemini page (`logo_gemini_2025_color_2x_web_96dp.png`), verified byte-for-byte against the live source on 2026-05-14; Gemini Enterprise currently uses the same shared Gemini visual identity.

items.name: Microsoft Foundry
items.notes: Reviewed Microsoft product image/logo asset sourced from the official Azure AI Foundry product page and stored locally for site use.

items.name: AWS Bedrock
items.notes: Official AWS architecture icon from Icon-package_01302026.

items.name: Google Vertex AI
items.notes: Official Google Cloud product/service icon from the Google Cloud icon library.

items.name: Microsoft Agent Framework
items.notes: Official Microsoft Agent Framework logo asset from the owner-controlled microsoft/agent-framework repo (`python/packages/devui/frontend/public/agentframework.svg`), committed byte-for-byte.

items.name: Paperclip
items.notes: Official Paperclip favicon/icon asset from the owner-controlled homepage (`/favicon.svg`), verified byte-for-byte against the live source on 2026-05-13 and rendered as a square service icon.
